title: hieracium murorum subsp. savonicum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. savonicum is a subspecies of Hieracium murorum, commonly known as wall hawkweed, a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial for treating wounds and skin irritations. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. savonicum also make it useful for treating gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, but it's essential to consult with a medical professional before using any herbal remedies.
